meta.title: Kitsoki — a dev story on the slidey repo (bug fix + refine)

scenes.title: From a bug to a refined feature
scenes.subtitle: two phases of one dev story, end to end, on the slidey repo
scenes.narration: Two phases of a dev story on the slidey repository — a bug fixed end to end, and a feature refined by pointing right at it — with kitsoki driving every step.

scenes.lede: A bug lands — triage says one-shot.
scenes.body: A new bug is opened against slidey: grid-card decks with more than six cards drift their narration. The bug-fix room triages it as a one-shot, unsupervised fix. The developer says go, and kitsoki reproduces it, proposes a root-cause fix, implements it in an isolated worktree, runs the real test suite, self-reviews, and validates — closing out PR-ready.
scenes.narration: A bug is opened against slidey: grid-card decks drift their narration past six cards. The bug-fix room triages it as a one-shot fix. The developer says go, and kitsoki reproduces, fixes, tests, reviews, and validates it.

scenes.title: Bug → reproduce → fix → validate
scenes.caption: The bug-fix pipeline on a real slidey bug
scenes.narration: Every room is a deterministic state-machine beat: reproduce, propose, implement in a worktree, run the real test suite, self-review, and validate.

scenes.lede: A demo video arrives — refine by pointing at it.
scenes.body: As feature work completes, a demo deck is produced and lands for review. Instead of describing a change in prose, the developer points at an exact element on the rendered frame — a semantic anchor — and that anchor flows into a refine pass that edits precisely the scene that was pointed at. The before and after re-render in place.
scenes.narration: A demo deck arrives for review. The developer points at an exact element on the rendered frame, and that anchor flows into a refine pass that edits precisely what was pointed at — before and after re-rendered in place.

scenes.title: Annotate the frame → anchored refine
scenes.caption: Location-tied review → an anchored refine pass
scenes.narration: Location-tied feedback: point at the element, and the refine edits exactly that scene — no ambiguity about what to change.
And the whole film is a no-LLM, byte-deterministic replay: the runtime is a state machine, and the model is just a traceable callee.
scenes.tagline: Every frame is a deterministic, no-LLM replay
scenes.url: the runtime is a state machine; the model is a traceable callee
